title: Paraprenanthes glandulosissima
intro: Paraprenanthes glandulosissima, commonly known as the glandular paraprenanthes, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Paraprenanthes glandulosissima include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into various herbal formulas to promote health and wellness.
